title: Easy Villager Spawn Egg
description: Adds an easy crafting recipe for Villager Spawn Egg
body:
# Adds an easy crafting recipe for Villager Spawn Egg

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![The recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a681cd0a64ff139ee6f99966341598b27d6efff4.png)

## 
- Originally made to go along with Silabear's [VillEdit](https://modrinth.com/datapack/villedit)  so that custom villager creation in survival is possible
- Alternative to having ALL the spawn eggs from another DataPack or mod
